# programs.hexchat

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.hexchat`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.hexchat.channels` | `attribute set of (submodule)` | Configures {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/hexchat/servlist.conf`. |
| `programs.hexchat.channels.<name>.autojoin` | `list of string` | Channels list to autojoin on connecting to server. |
| `programs.hexchat.channels.<name>.charset` | `null or string` | Character set. |
| `programs.hexchat.channels.<name>.commands` | `list of string` | Commands to be executed on connecting to server. |
| `programs.hexchat.channels.<name>.loginMethod` | `null or one of "challengeAuth", "customCommands", "nickServ", "nickServMsg", "sasl", "saslExternal", "serverPassword"` | The login method. The allowed options are: `null` : Default `"nickServMsg"` : NickServ (`/MSG NickServ` + password) `"nickServ"` : NickServ (`/NICKSERV` + password) `"challengeAuth"` : Challenge Auth (username + password) `"sasl"` : SASL (username + password) `"serverPassword"` : Server password (`/PASS` password) `"saslExternal"` : SASL EXTERNAL (cert) `"customCommands"` : Use "commands" field for auth. For example `nix   commands = [ "/msg NickServ IDENTIFY my_password" ]   ` |
| `programs.hexchat.channels.<name>.nickname` | `null or string` | Primary nickname. |
| `programs.hexchat.channels.<name>.nickname2` | `null or string` | Secondary nickname. |
| `programs.hexchat.channels.<name>.options` | `null or (submodule)` | Channel options. |
| `programs.hexchat.channels.<name>.options.acceptInvalidSSLCertificates` | `null or boolean` | Accept invalid SSL certificates. |
| `programs.hexchat.channels.<name>.options.autoconnect` | `null or boolean` | Autoconnect to network. |
| `programs.hexchat.channels.<name>.options.bypassProxy` | `null or boolean` | Bypass proxy. |
| `programs.hexchat.channels.<name>.options.connectToSelectedServerOnly` | `null or boolean` | Connect to selected server only. |
| `programs.hexchat.channels.<name>.options.forceSSL` | `null or boolean` | Use SSL for all servers. |
| `programs.hexchat.channels.<name>.options.useGlobalUserInformation` | `null or boolean` | Use global user information. |
| `programs.hexchat.channels.<name>.password` | `null or string` | Password to use. Note this password will be readable by all user's in the Nix store. |
| `programs.hexchat.channels.<name>.realName` | `null or string` | Real name. Is used to populate the real name field that appears when someone uses the `WHOIS` command on your nick. |
| `programs.hexchat.channels.<name>.servers` | `list of string` | IRC Server Address List. |
| `programs.hexchat.channels.<name>.userName` | `null or string` | User name. Part of your `user@host` hostmask that appears to other on IRC. |
| `programs.hexchat.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable HexChat, a graphical IRC client. |
| `programs.hexchat.overwriteConfigFiles` | `null or boolean` | Enables overwriting HexChat configuration files ({file}`hexchat.conf`, {file}`servlist.conf`). Any existing HexChat configuration will be lost. Make sure to back up any previous configuration before enabling this. Enabling this setting is recommended, because everytime HexChat application is closed it overwrites Nix/Home Manager provided configuration files, causing: 1. Nix/Home Manager provided configuration to be out of sync with actual active HexChat configuration. 2. Nix/Home Manager updates to be blocked until configuration files are manually removed. |
| `programs.hexchat.package` | `null or package` | The hexchat package to use. |
| `programs.hexchat.settings` | `null or (attribute set of string)` | Configuration for {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/hexchat/hexchat.conf`, see <https://hexchat.readthedocs.io/en/latest/settings.html#list-of-settings> for supported values. |
| `programs.hexchat.theme` | `null or package` | Theme package for HexChat. Expects a derivation containing decompressed theme files. Note, `.hct` files are actually ZIP files, as seen in example. |
